name: Mr. Food's "Super" Bowl Dip- 11/29/95
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 oz jar dried beef, chopped (about 3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, mix all ingredients together except the breads.
2. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
3. Using a serrated knife, cut a hole in the top of one of the breads.
4. Hollow out the bread, leaving 1 inch of bread around the sides, creating a bowl.
5. Pour the dip mixture into the hollowed-out bread shell.
6. Cut the second bread and the top and insides of the first one into 1-inch chunks for dipping.
Yield: 3 1/2 cups
